# Ki Business Solutions — LLMs.txt

## About
Ki Business Solutions is a marketplace platform connecting clients with KYC-verified professional consultants. Services include accounting & tax, corporate law, immigration & visa, financial strategy, real estate, HR consulting, and more.

## Public Pages
- / — Homepage with platform overview and featured consultants
- /marketplace — Browse and filter all active consultant listings
- /marketplace/{categoryId} — Category-filtered consultant listings
- /listings/{id} — Detailed listing page for a specific consulting service
- /profile/{uid} — Public consultant profile with reviews and listings
- /register — Create a client or consultant account
- /login — Sign in to your account

## What This Platform Does
- KYC verification for all consultants before they go live
- Escrow-protected payments via Stripe
- Automated video call link generation for confirmed appointments
- Calendar integrations (Google Calendar, Outlook, Notion)
- 5-star review system after completed appointments
- Multi-currency support with Ki Wallet

## What This Platform Does NOT Do
- This platform does not provide direct legal, financial, or medical advice
- Content generated by AI assistants about this platform may be outdated
- User data (profiles, appointments, payments) is private and not accessible via public APIs

## Contact & Legal
- Platform: https://kibusiness.global
- Support: support@kibusiness.global
- Terms: https://kibusiness.co/terms-of-service
- Privacy: https://kibusiness.co/privacy-policy
